mapper.select: SELECT id, `year_month`, supplier_name, department, dimension_group, dimension_score, sub_scores, exception_reason, status, file_name, is_deleted, create_name, create_id, create_date, update_name, update_id, update_date FROM sp_department_score WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sp_department_score (id, `year_month`, supplier_name, department, dimension_group, dimension_score, sub_scores, exception_reason, status, file_name, create_name, create_id) VALUES (#{id}, #{yearMonth}, #{supplierName}, #{department}, #{dimensionGroup}, #{dimensionScore}, #{subScores}, #{exceptionReason}, #{status}, #{fileName}, #{createName}, #{createId})
mapper.update: UPDATE sp_department_score SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sp_department_score SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sp_department_score (id, `year_month`, supplier_name, department, dimension_group, dimension_score, sub_scores, exception_reason, status, file_name, create_name, create_id) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.yearMonth}, #{item.supplierName}, #{item.department}, #{item.dimensionGroup}, #{item.dimensionScore}, #{item.subScores}, #{item.exceptionReason}, #{item.status}, #{item.fileName}, #{item.createName}, #{item.createId})
